arts.ttl: Sunday's FA Cup predictions including Man United vs. Fulham
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's FA Cup fixtures, including Manchester United vs. Fulham.

arts.ttl: Man Utd ace who became priest returns to club and makes admission after eight-year absence
arts.sum: Footballer-turned-priest Philip Mulryne, who now lives in a monastery, has revealed how he keeps up with Manchester United's fortunes despite not having access to a TV

arts.ttl: How Manchester United should line-up vs Fulham in FA Cup fixture
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, George Smith, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Man United take on Fulham in the fifth round of the FA Cup at Old Trafford on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: I was called Man United's best finisher since Paul Scholes – I won't forget how I was treated
arts.sum: Giuseppe Rossi has reflected on his time at Manchester United with fondness, citing how Sir Alex Ferguson treated him like his son after comparing him to Red Devils legend Paul Scholes

arts.ttl: Noussair Mazraoui returns as problem exposed - Manchester United predicted line-up vs Fulham
arts.sum: Man United will be looking to make it back-to-back wins when they welcome Fulham to Old Trafford in the FA Cup on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: 'They already know' - Ruben Amorim fires transfer warning to his Manchester United players
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim will have aspirations of putting his own stamp on his squad this summer.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Ruben Amorim drops Fulham team hint as Andre Onana sent three-word message
arts.sum: Manchester United face Fulham in the FA Cup on Sunday, giving Ruben Amorim's side the chance to reach the quarter-finals and boost their hopes of lifting silverware this season

arts.ttl: Man Utd staff 'really excited' about wonderkid who has already saved Red Devils
arts.sum: Manchester United’s under-18s dramatically sealed a place in the FA Youth Cup semi-finals against Arsenal on Friday night with one young star catching the eye for the Red Devils

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd line up Amorim replacement; Barcelona target Garnacho
arts.sum: The latest transfer news, rumours and gossip circulating around the world.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim hints at Man United squad summer clear out as 'ruthless' manager warns his players about 'harming the team'
arts.sum: United have endured a miserable season, with Amorim having found it difficult to improve the team's fortunes since his appointment in November.
